body:
sapphic-dice:

the-ivy-grows-regardless:

sapphic-dice:

Fuck grad school.

Just the thought of going to class tomorrow makes me wanna… disappear on a train.

So, nope. Remembering why I don’t wanna do grad school, even if it’s good for my career. I’m just DONE with college.

Let’s get this final semester done. ^>^

I often imagine driving far away late at night without telling anyone and somehow just starting over somewhere new. Just getting in my car and running away from everything i know.

Part of it is wanting to prove that I could. Just show that I’m not trapped here, that there are other options even if I don’t take those options.

*hugs*

Real…

That’s… real.

I daydream, especially when depressed or overwhelmed, about taking a train in the middle of the night, not telling a soul, and disappearing up north into the PNW. Leaving my whole life… and all my baggage behind me. And just… starting over.

Because no one thought I could. To prove I can make it… so… I get it.

Analogous musings…

During my first attempt at college, I pondered long and hard about disappearing (this was the late 90s, so disappearing was a lot more feasible), cutting all ties, and popping up in another city as me. I never could quite bring myself to do it.
